description: The entity identifies and assesses changes that could significantly impact the system of internal control.

subcriteria.name: environmental_changes
subcriteria.reference_text: Risk assessment evaluates changes in the regulatory, economic, and technology environment. New laws, regulations, and industry standards monitored and assessed for impact on internal controls.

subcriteria.name: business_technology_changes
subcriteria.reference_text: Impact of new business lines, acquisitions, technology migrations, and infrastructure changes assessed. New cloud services, third-party integrations, and system upgrades evaluated for security impact before deployment.

subcriteria.name: vendor_changes
subcriteria.reference_text: Changes in vendor relationships, new subprocessors, and partner dependencies assessed for risk impact. Leadership changes and organizational restructuring evaluated.

mismatch_signals.reason: Log management is operational, not change impact assessment.
Backup procedures are not change impact assessment.
